_comment: Tokens to exclude from the trending pool BEFORE analysis. Hot-updateable without touching skill code. Add new stablecoins, wrappers, or known scams here.

_notes.manual_block: Use this list to block specific tokens by ticker or mint address. Useful for known scams, rugged tokens, or tokens that keep appearing despite filter rules.
_notes.matching: Matching is case-insensitive on ticker. Duplicate tickers across different mint addresses are handled separately by keeping only the highest-volume instance.
